description: Yoshi is a personal finance service that gives users access to linked financial accounts, transactions, investments, scores, and paper-trading workflows. Its product also supports AI-assistant access to that data through an MCP server.
summary: Yoshi exposes a bearer-authenticated REST API at `https://api.yoshi.ai/v1`, a `yoshi` CLI, and a hosted MCP server at `https://agents.yoshi.ai/mcp`.
